allow: PowerShell($mvn = Get-Command mvn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($mvn\) { "mvn: $\($mvn.Source\)" } else { "mvn NOT found" }; $java = Get-Command java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($java\) { java -version } else { "java NOT found" })

PowerShell($mvn = \(Get-Command mvn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($mvn\) { "mvn: " + $mvn.Source } else { "no mvn en PATH" }; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\secon\\OneDrive\\Escritorio\\PruebaApp\\mvnw.cmd"\) { "mvnw presente" } else { "sin mvnw" }; "--- target ---"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\secon\\OneDrive\\Escritorio\\PruebaApp\\target" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
PowerShell($d = Get-Command docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($d\) { "docker: " + $d.Source; docker version --format '{{.Server.Version}}' } else { "no docker en PATH" })
PowerShell($cmd = Get-Command sqlcmd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { "sqlcmd: $\($cmd.Source\)" } else { "sqlcmd NO encontrado" })

PowerShell($log = "C:\\Users\\secon\\OneDrive\\Escritorio\\PruebaApp\\target\\run-test2.log"; $deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(90\); $ready=$false; while\(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\){ if\(Test-Path $log\){ $c = Get-Content $log -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($c -match "Inicialización de base de datos completada"\){ $ready=$true; break }; if\($c -match "APPLICATION FAILED TO START" -or $c -match "UnsatisfiedLinkError" -or $c -match "BUILD FAILURE" -or $c -match "ERROR"\){ break } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 }; "ready=$ready"; if\($ready\){ try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/parques" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; $codes = [regex]::Matches\($r.Content, 'PN-\\d+'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Select-Object -Unique; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - parques: $\($codes.Count\)" } catch { "REQ-ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } else { Get-Content $log -Tail 20 })
